progress_tail.summary: Refreshed IR complexity accounting to resolve semantic mappings from rules, eliminating stale registry-intent drift in workflow and ir_arch gate.
progress_tail.next_focus: Continue IR simplification by reducing raw single-semantic ratio while keeping complex-family ratio at 0; then proceed backend modular splits.

progress_tail.summary: Enabled strict ir_arch complexity gates (complex<=10%, global_unique<=40%) and validated m2 run.
progress_tail.next_focus: Refresh full196 force_compile evidence on HEAD, then continue backend_compiler cpp module split wave.

progress_tail.summary: Completed wave3 cpp module split for CUDA/RVV codegen and validated backend smoke on add2d (RVV+CUDA pass).
progress_tail.next_focus: Continue backend wave3 by splitting remaining dispatch/emit blocks and then run a wider backend kernel batch before full196 refresh.

progress_tail.summary: Patched CUDA cpp dispatch for min_dim (reduce_min+argmin) and closed 8-kernel fullstack regression batch with RVV local/remote + CUDA all pass.
progress_tail.next_focus: Run full196 force_compile with RVV local+remote+CUDA on HEAD for fresh coverage evidence, then continue cpp codegen module split.

progress_tail.summary: Isolated run_coverage_batches per-family pipeline_out_dir/seed_cache_dir and added dry-run regression test; started full category run full196_categories_head_v2 and reached elementwise_broadcast kernel 98/98 pipeline + rvv_local complete before manual interrupt in rvv_remote stage for controlled continuation.
progress_tail.next_focus: Resume full196 category run from family elementwise_broadcast (rvv_remote/cuda/aggregate), then continue remaining 6 families and write fresh HEAD coverage evidence.

progress_tail.summary: Added category chunking (family-kernel-chunk-size=12 default), remote-only RVV mode (--skip-rvv-local), and validated attention_sequence fullstack (pipeline+rvv_remote+cuda). Started non-elementwise multi-family run in remote-only mode and reached reduction chunk_001 rvv_remote in-progress before controlled interrupt for checkpointing.
progress_tail.next_focus: Resume coverage_non_elementwise_remote_cuda_v1 with --resume, then run elementwise_broadcast by chunks and aggregate all 7 categories for HEAD freshness.

progress_tail.summary: Fixed CUDA C++ dispatch for LLM-expanded reduction patterns: cumsum(iota+identity wrappers), row_mean(const+reduce_sum+cast+div), and expanded var_mean2d(9-op, Var/Mean outputs).
progress_tail.next_focus: Resume non-elementwise category batches with remote-only RVV + CUDA, then complete elementwise chunks and aggregate full196 evidence on HEAD.

progress_tail.summary: Resumed 7-family category coverage run with chunk_size=12 and remote-only RVV + CUDA; reduction/norm_activation/matmul_linear rerun now fully dual_pass, elementwise_broadcast in progress.
progress_tail.next_focus: Let coverage_failed_families_fix1_v1 finish all remaining families (elementwise/index/conv/attention) and then aggregate 7/7 categories into fresh full196 evidence on HEAD.
